title: BSNC Announces 2024 Shareholder Dividend and Elder Distribution
summary: The Bering Straits Native Corporation (BSNC) Board of Directors has declared a record-high dividend of $12.86 per share. Shareholders (on record as of Nov. 1, 2024) with 100 shares, for example, will receive $1,286. In addition, a $1,500 Elder distribution has been declared for original BSNC shareho...

title: America’s SBDC Honors Two Alaska SBDC Staff with ’40 Under 40′ Awards
summary: Two Alaska Small Business Development Center (SBDC) staff members at the UAA Business Enterprise Institute have received prestigious national awards for their leadership in empowering small businesses. Katie Nave, BuyAlaska Program Director, and Harley Tennant, SBDC Communications Manager, are both named to the 2024 America’s SBDC National 40 Under 40 Awards list. 2024 America’s SBDC, Top 40 Under 40 The America’s...

title: Energy Education Under the Midnight Sun
summary: Energy Education Under the Midnight Sun REAP Educators partnered with KidWind to host the 2024 RECharge Academy in Fairbanks. Momentum has been building nationwide for cultivating energy literacy in K-12 classrooms.
